title: fix: make cost estimation work as soon as data comes in
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Real-time math
gist.blurb: Cost estimates now kick in almost instantly. No more waiting until tomorrow to see how much pollen your new model is sipping.
gist.summary: Updated the model stats pipeline to include current-day data, allowing cost estimations to calculate after just three successful requests.
gist.impact: Developers can now see accurate cost estimates for models in real-time instead of waiting for the next day's data.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a glowing real-time chart, with the robot printing a tiny receipt to represent instant cost calculations.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot looking at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) chart on a retro terminal. The robot is printing a tiny pixelated receipt. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
